title: UK REACH authorisation for ADCR Consortium (pre-treatments), review report, 24 February 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation (review report) under UK REACH.  Substance name  Sodium dichromate   Authorised use   Pre-treatments: deoxidising, pickling, etching and/or desmutting using sodium dichromate in aerospace and defence industry and its supply chains.   Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number   ADCR Consortium: Brenntag UK Ltd (UKREACH/25/08/00)   Date of decision   24 February 2025  "
